about.title: A club, not a shop.
about.body: We're a non-profit cultural association in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria. If you love fantasy, strategy or just spending a good evening in good company, this is your place.
about.body2: We run events that nurture creativity, strategic thinking and connection. We believe in the power of play to bring people together, break barriers and build community.
about.bullet1: Venue at C. São Paulo, 55 (Schamann) open 24/7 for members.
about.bullet3: Veteran game masters to onboard newcomers.
about.bullet4: Partnerships with 20+ local shops and bars.

games.title: What's rolling most this season
games.subtitle: Hover any tile. Each box is an invitation to a table.

comunidad.title: Community
comunidad.body: Care and company. Empathy, listening and mutual trust around the table.

participacion.title: Participation
participacion.body: Being part of something alive: sharing ideas, time and experience every game.

diversidad.title: Diversity
diversidad.body: Each person brings something unique. We live together with respect and celebrate difference.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about account access, reservations, equipment, and check-in.
faq.currentRules: This guide covers current reservation rules. Planned features are clearly marked.

activation.question: How do I activate my account?
activation.answer: Ask an administrator for an activation link. The link can be used once and expires after 24 hours.

recovery.question: How do I recover access to my account?
recovery.answer: Ask an administrator for a recovery link. Recovery is available only for active accounts; the link can be used once and expires after 24 hours.

password.question: What are the password requirements?
password.answer: Use at least 8 characters, including an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a number. Only letters and numbers are allowed.

create.question: When can I book a table?
create.answer: You can book from today through 7 days ahead. The calendar uses 30-minute slots throughout the day. You cannot hold overlapping reservations, and an event may block an entire room.

surfaces.question: How do removable-top tables work?
surfaces.answer: Their upper and lower surfaces can be booked independently, including at the same time. Choose the surface you need when booking.

cancel.question: When can I cancel a reservation?
cancel.answer: You can cancel more than 60 minutes before its start time. After that cutoff, contact an administrator.

conflict.question: Why did an available slot become unavailable?
conflict.answer: Another member may have booked it at the same time. You will see a conflict message and availability will refresh so you can choose another slot.

optional.question: Can I add equipment to my reservation?
optional.answer: Yes, when the room has optional equipment available for the whole reservation. Equipment already booked for that time, or assigned to another room, cannot be selected.

qr.question: How do I check in?
qr.answer: Sign in with the member account that made the reservation, then scan the table's QR code. Check-in opens 5 minutes before the start and closes at the earlier of 60 minutes after the start or the reservation end.

noShow.question: What happens if I do not check in?
noShow.answer: A pending reservation stays valid until the earlier of 60 minutes after its start or its end time. If you have not checked in by then, it expires and is marked as a no-show.

overview.question: What are Saved Game reservations?
overview.answer: They reserve the lower surface of a removable-top table for whole days, for up to 3 months.

use.question: How do I use a saved table?
use.answer: The same member books the upper surface on each day they play and scans its QR code. Each scan records one attendance.

renewal.question: Can I extend a Saved Game reservation?
renewal.answer: Yes. The same member can renew it from the Saved Game card during the final 15 days of the current period.

footer.madeWithLove: Made with love for the gaming community
